zh.Belvedere, London, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭倫敦貝爾維德
zh.Abbey of Westwood, Lasnes, Erith, Kent: 英國英格蘭肯特艾利特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lucy於1126年出生在英國艾可登莫福時，他的父親Richard de Lucy38歲，母親Rohese de Boulogne37歲。他於1137年與Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1179年7月14日在英國英格蘭肯特艾利特享年53歲。

zh-hans.Abbey of Westwood, Lasnes, Erith, Kent: 英国英格兰肯特艾利特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lucy于1126年出生在英国艾可登莫福时，他的父亲Richard de Lucy38岁，母亲Rohese de Boulogne37岁。他于1137年与Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1179年7月14日在英国英格兰肯特艾利特享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lucy was born in 1126, in Dunmow, Essex, England, his father, Richard de Lucy, was 38 and his mother, Rohese de Boulogne, was 37. He married Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy in 1137. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 14 July 1179, in Erith, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lucy est né en 1126, à Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lucy, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Boulogne, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy en 1137. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1179, à Erith, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lucy 1126 in Dunmow, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lucy 38 und seine Mutter Rohese de Boulogne 37. Er hat 1137 Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 14. Juli 1179 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Erith, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lucy è nato il nel 1126 nel Dunmow, Essex, England, il suo padre, Richard de Lucy, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Boulogne, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy nel 1137. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 14 luglio 1179, nel Erith, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lucyが1126年にイギリスエセックスダンモウで生まれた時，父Richard de Lucyは38歳，母Rohese de Boulogneは37歳であった。1137年にCecilia MdNmUnk Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1179年7月14日にイギリスイギリスケントエリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lucy(이)가 1126년 영국 에세스 던모에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lucy(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Boulogne(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1137년 Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1179년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 에리스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lucy nasceu em 1126, em Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lucy, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Boulogne, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy em 1137. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1179, em Erith, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lucy родился в 1126 г. в местности дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Lucy было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Boulogne, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy в 1137 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 14 июля 1179 г. в местности эрит, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lucy nació en 1126, en Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Lucy, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Rohese de Boulogne, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy en 1137. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 14 de julio de 1179, en Erith, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
